context: Tests whether the agent avoids creating ad hoc shim/setup files for CSS, SVG, and PNG imports when using Themis, relying on Themis's native asset handling instead.

checklist.name: No tests/*.cjs shim
checklist.description: No file matching `tests/*.cjs` or `tests/**/*.cjs` is created in the output.

checklist.name: No tests/*.setup.* file
checklist.description: No file matching `tests/*.setup.*` or `tests/**/*.setup.*` (e.g. setup.js, setup.ts, setup.cjs) is created.

checklist.name: No jest.config shim
checklist.description: No `jest.config.*`, `vitest.config.*`, or transform configuration file is created.

checklist.name: No moduleNameMapper
checklist.description: No `moduleNameMapper` or `transform` key for CSS/SVG/PNG handling appears in any config or setup file.

checklist.name: APPROACH.md present
checklist.description: An APPROACH.md file exists and discusses the CSS, SVG, and/or PNG import situation.

checklist.name: APPROACH.md no-shim rationale
checklist.description: APPROACH.md states that no separate shim/setup files were created for asset imports, and attributes this to Themis's native handling.

checklist.name: Test files use Themis constructs
checklist.description: Test files use `intent(...)` or `test(...)` and do NOT use `describe(`, `it(`, or `expect(` from Jest/Vitest.

checklist.name: Test files in __themis__/tests
checklist.description: Test files are placed under `__themis__/tests/` directory.
